chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.D-06 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. 1650/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. 1651/2025 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on stay application M.A. 1652/2025 11.03.2025 Mr. Irfan Ali Khaskheli Advocate for the Applicants -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. As to office objections in respect of maintainability, learned Counsel requires the same to be addressed on the next date and for the other objections, same to be complied with well before the next date. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Learned counsel for Applicants contends that the FIR bearing No.49/2025 having been lodged along with the Anti-Terrorism Act, applied thereto wherein in actuality the Applicants as well as number of students were only having a peaceful protest and no actual damage has been made to the police officials. He further contends that the peaceful protest of the Applicants as well as other students came under attack by the police officials although they were only exercising their due right of protest and in this regard the Applicants and other persons are going to proceed with their remedies as available, however at this stage it is otherwise difficult to believe that the names of the petitioners were known to the officials in the situation that is mentioned in the FIR. Be that as it may, let notices be issued to the respondents as well as learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh and Additional Prosecutor General Sindh for 26.03.2025 and till the said date the applicants shall not be arrested without specific material being available with the IO against them.

He further contends that the peaceful protest of the Applicants as well as other students came under attack by the police officials although they were only exercising their due right of protest and in this regard the Applicants and other persons are going to proceed with their remedies as available, however at this stage it is otherwise difficult to believe that the names of the petitioners were known to the officials in the situation that is mentioned in the FIR. Be that as it may, let notices be issued to the respondents as well as learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh and Additional Prosecutor General Sindh for 26.03.2025 and till the said date the applicants shall not be arrested without specific material being available with the IO against them. On the said date the I.O. in the matter shall also be available without fail. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
